title: noccaea lilacina
intro: Noccaea lilacina, also known as Purple Alpine Rock Cress, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Noccaea lilacina include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
